examples.label: Bento — Tile Grid
examples.description: Alternate bento layout that arranges apps as a tile grid with an 'All apps' footer link. Uses udc-nav-bento__tiles + udc-nav-tile + udc-nav-bento__footer + udc-nav-button__trailing — the four subparts that were missing from Demo Builder coverage.

examples.label: Title Only
examples.description: Bare page-title variant of the title-area (Figma _udc-nav-header_title-area Title Only=True). No bento trigger chrome — just the page title rendered at paragraph/xl-bold. Use when the page does not need an app switcher in the header.
